falsifier: If v_RMS in the outermost three bins is consistent with pure Newtonian (no enhancement) at >3sigma, OR exceeds ILG at >3sigma, the wide-binary row is refuted.
ingest_step_required: Download the Hernandez 2024 wide-binary catalog and El-Badry 2021 Gaia EDR3 wide-binary table, normalise into columns (pair_id, separation_kau, v_relative_kms, e_v_relative_kms, total_mass_Msun, parallax_mas, source), and place at the planned path.
next_actions: place wide_binaries_catalog.csv at the planned path
rerun this script without --check to record SHA256 + row count
